definitions: an administrative division of a city or town

examples.text: In 2018, two long years after Pritchett’s discovery, the federal district court ruled in favor of France.

reviewSessions.example_text: In 2018, two long years after Pritchett’s discovery, the federal district court ruled in favor of France.
expected_definitions: an administrative division of a city or town
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案基本正确，表达了“地区”的意思，但未体现“城市或城镇的行政区”这一更具体含义。
